chinese_news.title: 功效洗护市场，跑不出下一个完美日记
chinese_news.summary:
走进美国 Sephora、Ulta 或欧洲 Douglas 这样的美妆零售集合店，货架上的景象或许会让你感到意外：占据大量陈列面积的，不只是护肤品，还有护发产品。从基础清洁，到去屑、防脱，再到头皮微生态、蛋白键修护、抗热损伤等护理产品，护发区的复杂程度已经几乎与护肤区无异。

根据市场研究机构 Circana 的数据，2025 年美国高端护发零售市场同比增长 8%，是高端美妆所有品类中增速最快的——超过彩妆（4%）、护肤（3%），仅次于香水（5%）。但比增速更值得关注的是品类的内部结构：基础洗发水与护发素仅实现个位数增长，而修护治疗类（Treatments）与造型类产品——那些主打烫染修护、蛋白键修复、头皮健康的高附加值品类——则以双位数速度扩张。其中头皮护理已连续三年保持双位数增长，新品发布数量同比上升 20% 以上，且绝大多数是修护治疗类产品。

中国市场也出现了相似的结构性分化。据 Joy Group 战略总监 Stefan Huang 引述的行业数据，2025 年上半年中国线上洗护市场整体增速几近停滞，仅为 0.09%；而中高端价格带却逆势

chinese_news.title: 珀莱雅收购花知晓，但美妆界的“安踏”还没诞生
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜任彩茹

编辑｜乔芊

一家富有“少女心”与“童话感”的美妆新锐品牌，找到了自己的阶段性归宿。

5月21日晚，珀莱雅公告称，旗下全资子公司珀莱雅（海南）拟以3.51亿元现金收购深圳花知晓电子商务有限公司12.5479%的股权。交易完成后，珀莱雅对花知晓的持股比例将从38.4521%提升至51%。财务层面，花知晓也将正式纳入珀莱雅的合并报表范围。

珀莱雅关于收购花知晓部分股权的公告

珀莱雅正在推进“A+H”上市，此时控股花知

chinese_news.title: 对话VITURE姜公略：什么才是XR眼镜该有的样子？
chinese_news.summary:
过去十年，XR（扩展现实）赛道始终陷在一种怪异的叙事里——

在从业者高呼着“下一代计算平台”的宏大愿景时，资本市场也曾在元宇宙的热潮中疯狂押注，而一旦落地到消费端，这个行业却始终未能摆脱极客玩具的宿命。

从Google Glass的黯然退场，再到一众VR/AR厂商的折戟，XR行业在跌宕中，迎来了前所未有的冷静时刻。

行业的艰辛在于，尽管所有人都清楚技术终局，但抵达终局的路径却布满荆棘。在种种“不可能三角”中，行业在缺乏共识中蜿蜒前进。

在略显沉闷的行业氛围中，XR厂商VITURE近日发布了一款全新产品——VITURE Beast。作为一个此前主攻海外游戏市场、鲜少发声的“隐形冠军”，VITURE此次转向强攻中国市场，且逐渐走出了游戏叙事的举动，自然引发了行业不少关注。

VITURE创始人兼CEO姜公略在发布会上直言，这款产品是不是简单的升级，而是一款集过去三年研发成果、“跃迁性”的产品。

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：下一个杀手级AI产品，会出现在哪个赛道？| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
下一个杀手级AI产品，是眼镜、是Agent，还是某个尚未命名的“物理世界入口”？这场圆桌没有标准答案，却达成一个共识：单纯套壳大模型的应用注定短命，只有长期在线、连接物理世界、能完成真实交互闭环的产品，才可能成为下一个百亿级赛道。从AI眼镜到具身智能，入口之争已悄然打响。

硬件先行还是生态为王？C端规模还是B端付费？最终指向同一个逻辑：纯套壳应用、弱交互硬件注定被淘汰，只有“多模态底座+AI原生智能体+可穿戴硬件”三位一体，才能让AI从聊天框真正走进现实。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

<

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：当AI进入产业前线：未来最稀缺的AI人才，会是谁？| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
稀缺的，到底是懂AI的人，还是懂业务的人？

一个反直觉的判断——懂AI这件事正在快速贬值，而能在关键低频决策中做出判断的人，才是未来的稀缺品。高频重复的工作最容易被AI替代，但在打造爆品、建立品牌等低频高影响力的决策上，人的判断依然不可替代，企业AI转型的最大卡点也不是技术或数据，而是“想不到应用场景”， 当前AI的利润大头仍在基础设施层，应用端的ROI尚未完全释放，但拐点会比预想来得更快。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

郑王宇丨36氪基金投资副总裁（主持）

龚毅丨

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：人才特种兵：“AI原生人才”与“产业老炮”的共生手册| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
真正AI原生的人，甚至不会来这个现场。但对于那些积极转型的20%，如何找到、培养并留住他们，这里有一本实战手册。

只有1%的企业是AI原生企业，20%积极拥抱变化，80%在苦苦挣扎；人才亦然。圆桌深入探讨了企业“赶时髦招AI人才”的焦虑、通过黑客松内部挖掘AI人才的方法、以及“事业留人、文化留人”的留存策略。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

帮主丨36氪《AI局内人》主播（主持）

郑鹏宇丨杭州颜柯教育科技有限公司创始人

肖玛峰丨AI招聘平台TTC创始

chinese_news.title: 对话王小川：离开通用人工智能的主干道之后
chinese_news.summary:
“如果没有转型，继续走主流道路，你也会有同等程度的焦虑。”王小川说，这次转型，让他真正回归到从创业第一天就最想做的事情：造AI医生。

访谈｜邓咏仪 杨轩

文｜邓咏仪

编辑｜张雨忻

一年前，王小川带着百川智能来了一次激烈的“大刹车”：大幅缩减通用模型团队，关闭金融等多条行业线，All in医疗大模型。但与此同时，整个大模型行业却热闹非凡，大厂和创业公司轮番进行“轰炸

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：AI浓度与转化率：数字体验的实战增长法则
chinese_news.summary:
AI浓度并非越高越好，转化率的秘密在于人机共生的平衡点。

“AI应像手机一样贯穿全流程”，而面对亲子游客和老年群体，主动将AI浓度降至50%，却实现了超50%的转化率。浓度的关键是以人为本、文化温度先行。

杨晟丨珀乐互动科技创始人

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $75,000 by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump Iran peace deal announcement (CoinDesk signal) and narrative shift toward crypto as geopolitical hedge are driving BTC strength; key resistance test in next 8 weeks.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk headline 'Bitcoin heads higher as President Trump announces Iran peace agreement' + macro tail-risk bid

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum outperform Bitcoin (ETH/BTC ratio above 0.065) by end of Q2 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Vitalik Buterin's public defense of Ethereum Foundation neutrality (Cointelegraph) signals renewed institutional confidence; current ETH weakness creates asymmetric entry for recovery bet.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph 'Buterin fires back at Ethereum Foundation critics' + Tom Lee portfolio drawdown suggests capitulation sentiment

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut interest rates by more than 75bps total in 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Consumer inflation pinch (CNBC travel/food) + financial stress narratives (CNBC 'entrenched in financial stress') suggest Fed will pivot harder than consensus; May CPI data due soon.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC 'Americans feeling inflation's pinch' + 'Americans entrenched in financial stress' + ongoing geopolitical risk premium (Iran, Ukraine) supporting dovish bias

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Disney stock underperform SPY by 5%+ through December 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will XRP close above $3.00 by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump administration hawkish on Iran (naval blockade) reduces Middle East conflict escalation risk, supporting risk-on asset rotation; XRP positioned as payment layer narrative (CoinDesk 'crypto rails becoming default payment layer for AI agents').
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk payment layer + crypto trending momentum + Trump Iran de-escalation narrative

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Nvidia stock (NVDA) close above $150 by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance / NASDAQ official closing price

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Hacker News 'Memory has grown to nearly two-thirds of AI chip component costs' + demand uncertainty for H200/next-gen architectures

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the DXY (US Dollar Index) close below 100 by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump Iran de-escalation reduces geopolitical safe-haven demand; if Fed cuts 75+ bps (Q3 thesis), dollar weakness likely but consensus pricing remains too hawkish.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC inflation pinch narratives + Fed rate cut expectations + Trump peace deal momentum removing tail-risk premium from USD

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum (ETH) close above $4,000 by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Buterin's public stance on EF neutrality (Cointelegraph) signals reduced governance fragmentation risk; institutional staking flows and Shanghai upgrade narrative reopening at 2B ETH market cap milestone.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph Buterin defense + positive blockchain researcher commentary on EF + AI agent adoption using ETH rails (CoinDesk)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Chinese AI talent inflows into Western tech firms exceed 15% YoY growth by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: H-1B visa petition data (USCIS) + LinkedIn job postings (filtered for AI roles, China-educated hires)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr roundtable consensus on 'AI-native talent scarcity' and '懂业务的人' (business-domain experts) as bottleneck; Western firms will aggressively hire despite China geopolitical tensions.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr 'AI原生人才' and 'AI转型最大卡点' discussions signal structural talent shortage driving immigration demand

market_questions_to_create.question: Will NEAR Protocol (NEAR) outperform Solana (SOL) by 20%+ through September 2026?
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: NEAR in crypto trending; AI agent adoption narrative (CoinDesk rails) favors modular L1s with lower fees; Solana's MEV/validator centralization concerns underpriced relative to NEAR's developer sentiment.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Crypto trending NEAR momentum + CoinDesk 'AI agents use crypto rails' + Hacker News 'DeepSeek coding agent' = on-chain execution demand spike

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC / short DXY (carry trade): Trump Iran deal reduces geopolitical premium in USD, Fed cuts 75+ bps in H2 2026, Bitcoin becomes preferred safe-haven asset as stocks reprice earnings.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin heads higher as President Trump announces Iran peace agreement'
CNBC: 'Americans entrenched in financial stress' signals Fed dovish pressure
CNBC: Travel/recreation/food inflation suggests demand destruction → rate cut cycle
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump could escalate Iran tensions suddenly; Fed holds rates longer than expected due to sticky core inflation or wage growth; fiscal deficit limits Fed easing.
investment_theses.expression: Buy BTC perpetuals (2x leverage) / short USD futures (ICE DXY via USDU short) via CME

investment_theses.thesis: Long ETH/BTC ratio: Ethereum Foundation governance clarity (Buterin defense) + AI agent adoption on L1/L2 rails removes political overhang; institutional staking inflows accelerate into Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: 'Buterin fires back at Ethereum Foundation critics, recommits to neutrality'
Blockchain researcher defense of EF (Cointelegraph) signals institutional confidence recovery
CoinDesk: 'Crypto rails becoming default payment layer for AI agents'
investment_theses.counter_view: Bitcoin outperformance continues if geopolitical tail risks (Iran, Russia) escalate; Ethereum faces regulatory headwinds (SEC staking classification); ETH/BTC consolidates instead of reverting.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH perpetuals / short BTC perpetuals (1:1 ratio, 2x leverage via Hyperliquid or dYdX)

investment_theses.thesis: Long AI chip memory suppliers (SMI/SK Hynix via ADRs) / short NVDA: Memory costs now 66% of AI chip BOM; margin compression forces NVDA guidance cuts in Q3 earnings, but memory suppliers gain pricing power.
supporting_signals: Hacker News: 'Memory has grown to nearly two-thirds of AI chip component costs' (score 227, highly-discussed institutional signal)
Inference scaling demands (DeepSeek, Hyperliquid agents) require HBM3E supply; suppliers extracting rent
investment_theses.counter_view: NVDA's gross margin remains resilient due to monopoly pricing power; memory supplier capex boom leads to overcapacity and price wars by Q4 2026; market reprices memory cycle as temporary.
investment_theses.expression: Long SMI (via SMICY ADR) 2x / short NVDA (via QQQ short hedge) through July 31, 2026

investment_theses.thesis: Long Chinese AI talent / short US tech salary inflation: 36Kr roundtable consensus ('AI原生人才' scarcity) + low-cost Chinese engineers solving 'business domain' problem = structural wage arbitrage + offshore AI center growth in 2026–27.
supporting_signals: 36Kr roundtable: 'Truly AI-native talent doesn't exist in sufficient quantity; business-domain expertise is the real bottleneck'
36Kr: '20% of enterprises aggressively adopting AI; 80% still struggling' signals demand pull for outsourced AI development
Hacker News: 'Claude is not your architect' + 'Constraint Decay' comments signal LLM limitations, human expertise still critical
investment_theses.counter_view: US visa restrictions tighten; China talent drain accelerates onshore; US salary compression doesn't occur if tech unicorns face VC capital squeeze; hybrid offshore model fails due to IP/security concerns.
investment_theses.expression: Long offshore AI outsourcing ETFs (e.g., ICOL) / short broad US tech salaries via short Russell 2000 Tech (IYW) through December 2026

investment_theses.thesis: Long NEAR, AERO, HYPE (trending L1/execution layer tokens) vs short SOL: AI agent adoption (CoinDesk) will favor lower-fee, modular chains; Solana's MEV and validator centralization create arbitrage losses for agents; Hyperliquid's native orderbook model captures AI order flow.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Crypto rails becoming default payment layer for AI agents'
Crypto trending: NEAR, AERO, HYPE all rising simultaneously
Hacker News: 'DeepSeek native coding agent' + 'Hyperliquid, AI tokens leading next altcoin rally' (CoinDesk)
36Kr: AI agents require low-latency, low-cost execution → optimized L1 design wins
investment_theses.counter_view: Solana network effects and user base too entrenched; NEAR liquidity fragmentation; Hyperliquid remains niche derivatives venue; AI agent adoption hype doesn't translate to on-chain volume by end of 2026.
investment_theses.expression: Long NEAR / AERO / HYPE basket (equal-weight, 3x leverage via Hyperliquid) vs short SOL (1x short via perpetual) through September 2026
